channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Oil prices have surged above $100 due to major disruptions in energy supplies, impacting consumers and businesses globally.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran has driven oil prices above $100 a barrel, raising concerns about global inflation and economic recovery.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Apple is set to launch a new high-end 'Ultra' product lineup following the release of the low-cost MacBook Neo.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams secured a record contract extension for Trent McDuffie while various college basketball teams celebrated tournament victories ahead of March Madness.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-08
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from ancient life forms to advancements in mental health treatments and the challenges posed by scientific fraud.
